creator: andrew@fubar.geek.nz
text:
The updates are (after applying the above patches):
 - Change MASTER_SITES to "http://luaforge.net/frs/download.php/2664/"
 - Change the distinfo file to contain:
MD5 (luasocket-2.0.2.tar.gz) = 41445b138deb7bcfe97bff957503da8e
SHA256 (luasocket-2.0.2.tar.gz) = 4fd9c775cfd98841299851e29b30176caf289370fea1ff1e00bb67c2d6842ca6
SIZE (luasocket-2.0.2.tar.gz) = 115443

With these two changes the port builds correctly.

Andrew
